title: GEAS Task Contract
description: Canonical task contract capturing task intent, routing, acceptance criteria, approval state, baseline, and lifecycle status.

task_id.description: Stable task identifier within a mission.

title.description: Short human-readable label for the task.

goal.description: Concrete outcome the task is expected to achieve.

risk_level.description: Failure-cost classification used for routing and review conservatism.

acceptance_criteria.description: Observable criteria that must hold before the task may be closed as complete.

eval_commands.description: Repeatable validation commands or procedures attached to the contract.

retry_budget.description: Maximum meaningful validation-rework retries allowed for this task.

user_approved.description: Whether the user has approved this task contract as ready to enter execution.

surfaces.description: Reviewer-readable impact surfaces touched by the task.

primary_worker_slot.description: Default specialist slot assigned as the primary worker for this task.

primary_worker_type.description: Concrete implementation-specific worker type mapped from the primary worker slot.

required_reviewer_slots.description: Final reviewer slots chosen by the orchestrator after considering the primary worker slot, risk, surfaces, and mission context.

required_reviewer_types.description: Concrete reviewer types resolved from required_reviewer_slots by the implementation.

base_snapshot.description: Shared baseline snapshot this task starts from.

dependencies.description: Task IDs that must be passed before this task can start

status.description: Current lifecycle status for the task and its execution.
